GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc48126174 \h 3 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc48126175 \h 3 2. ADD C-000-EX21 CODE ID TO C-000 GOLBAL CODE PAGEREF _Toc48126176 \h 6 2.1 C-000-EX21 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc48126177 \h 7 2.2 Add system code s-590-<User defined> EX21 Enablement flag PAGEREF _Toc48126178 \h 8 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD C-0 0 0-EX 21 CODE ID TO C- 000 G LO BAL CODE 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX 21 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C- 000 - EX 21 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Add system code s-590 - <User defined> EX21 Enablement flag Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for System Code Type 590 Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Parameters action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click Save . Navigate back to system code 590. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code IDs action button in the lower right of the menu. Select the Checkbox for the task type that will be enabled for EX21. Click the blue Parameters tab. Check the box for parameter 99-99 to enable custom functionality for EX21 . Click Save. Following task types have parameter 99-99 enabled in MK -Cigarette Pick -Cooler Single Sell - Ecom Active Singles - Ecom Case Pick Singles -Freezer Single Sell -GMP Level 1 -SSG Level 1 -SSG Level 2

Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C- 000 - EX 21 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Parameters action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click Save . Navigate back to system code 590. Click the Checkbox to select the system code.
